title: Russian crude exports remain high
summary:
Main
By David Wech
In contrast to widespread assumptions and news pieces, Russian crude oil exports remain very high. Curtailments to domestic use, as struggling product exports limit refining operations, have been a crucial supporting factor for crude exports. Meanwhile, sanctions are unlikely to hinder Russian players from exporting oil over the coming months more than they already do.
